thought.text: I couldn't find any references to GitHub URLs in the project files either. Let me check if there's a documentation file that might contain information about the README or where it might be located.

tool_call.name: terminal
tool_call.arguments: {"command": "find /workspace/project -type f | grep -i \"doc\\|readme\"", "is_input": "false", "security_risk": "LOW", "summary": "Search for documentation files that might contain README information"}

summary: Search for documentation files that might contain README information
